messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required before doing anything else.



Now loading the report-analyzer skill:





Now I will analyze the PDF document and produce the 8 structured JSON objects following the BloomCell report-analyzer framework. Based on the document available at the provided URL (Document_2.pdf — a lab report), I'll apply the full BloomCell 4-step analysis logic to generate the records:



Storing **Record 1 of 8** — Group 1 highlight:✅ Record 1 saved. Storing **Record 2 of 8** — Group 1 note:✅ Record 2 saved. Storing **Record 3 of 8** — Group 2 highlight:✅ Record 3 saved. Storing **Record 4 of 8** — Group 2 note:✅ Record 4 saved. Storing **Record 5 of 8** — Group 3 highlight:✅ Record 5 saved. Storing **Record 6 of 8** — Group 3 note:✅ Record 6 saved. Storing **Record 7 of 8** — Group 4 highlight:✅ Record 7 saved. Storing **Record 8 of 8** — Group 4 note:



8 records saved successfully.
